What is the absolute value of a number?: 一个数字的绝对值是什么?
Its distance from zero on a number line: 数字线上从零到零的距离(总=0)
Set up two equations: x = a or x = −a: 设置两个方程式: x = a 或 x = - a
Write −a < x < a (AND compound inequalit: 撰写 -a < x < a (AND复合不平等)
Write x < −a or x > a (OR compound inequ: 写入 x < ~a 或 x > a (OR 化合物不平等)
All values between −4 and 4: −4 < x < 4: -4 和 4 之间的所有值 4 和 4 : - 4 < x < 4
All values less than −6 or greater than: 所有值小于-6或大于6的所有值
